# Vagdevi Enterprises - Premium Invisible Grills & Sports Nets Chennai

## Business Overview
Vagdevi Enterprises is a premium provider of modern invisible steel wire grills and heavy-duty sports netting solutions located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. We specialize in household safety, balcony protection, and sports field enclosures.

## Core Contacts
- **Phone**: +91 80190 91366
- **Email**: vagdevienterprises@gmail.com
- **Locations**: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India (14 neighborhoods covered)
- **Website**: https://vagdevienterprises.com

## Main Services
1. **Invisible Grills (3 Services)**:
   - Balcony Invisible Grills (balcony-invisible-grills)
   - Window Invisible Grills (window-invisible-grills)
   - Staircase Invisible Grills (staircase-invisible-grills)
2. **Sports Nets (2 Services)**:
   - Sports Nets (sports-nets)
   - Cricket Practice Nets (cricket-practice-nets)

## Areas Served in Chennai (14 Zones)
anna-nagar, adyar, omr, Velachery, tambaram, porur, sholinganallur, perungudi, Chennai Cantonment, t-nagar, medavakkam, chromepet, pallikaranai, saidapet.

## Technical Quality Specs
- **Grills**: SS316 marine-grade steel cables wrapped in clear nylon protective casing. Spacings: 2 to 3 inches.
- **Nets**: High-density UV-stabilized nylon mesh and monofilament braided ropes.
